problem id: 85af23eb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00010011 -> 11100111
  00000110 -> 11001111
  00010100 -> 01011111
  01000011 -> 01100111
  10000000 -> 11111111
  11011111 -> 10000111
  10110100 -> 01011111
  00111000 -> 00111111

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 00001111
